case_title: OPORTUN, INC. VS. LUIS ALFREDO BRACAMONTE RODRIQUEZ

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-30-2019 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-30-2019 BY A. JAMES ROBERTSON II. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. REPRESENTED BY GUADALUPE ACEVEDO LEGAL COLLECTIONS SPECIALIST. DEFENDANT LUIS ALFREDO BRACAMONTE RODRIGUEZ DID NOT APPEAR. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: A. JAMES ROBERTSON II; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS. FILED BY PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $55.00) SERVED JAN-05-2019, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT BRACAMONTE RODRIQUEZ, LUIS ALFREDO

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF OPORTUN, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BRACAMONTE RODRIQUEZ, LUIS ALFREDO $1,897.91 PRINCIPAL, $105.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,002.91 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,897.91 FILED BY OPORTUN, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT BRACAMONTE RODRIQUEZ, LUIS ALFREDO ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JAN-30-2019 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JAN-30-2019 - JUDGMENT.
